title: DDL, Constraints, Schema Evolution, and Integrity Repair · Query Repair Bay
summary: The support schema must reject impossible states and evolve while old application versions are still active. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a constraint-rich, reversible schema migration and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define tables with deliberate types, defaults, generated values, and named constraints.
Enforce NOT NULL, UNIQUE, CHECK, primary-key, and foreign-key invariants at the database boundary.
Choose restrict, cascade, set-null, or set-default actions from lifecycle ownership semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Order the regression proof · Debug Integrity Repair
steps.instruction:
Order the Integrity Repair evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Order the regression proof · Debug Integrity Repair.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Integrity Repair assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Order the regression proof · Debug Integrity Repair, keep Integrity Repair connected to executable relational evidence.

content.text: Import ticket 202 twice, reassign one unowned ticket, reject an invalid severity, and migrate a required category field without breaking the old writer. Preview mutation scope and retain rollback plus changed-row evidence. Competency probe: Profile legacy violations, quarantine ambiguity, repair deterministically, and validate constraints before enforcement.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Integrity Repair has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Order the regression proof · Debug Integrity Repair, name the row grain, Integrity Repair precondition, or invariant that must hold.

Preview mutation scope and retain rollback plus changed-row evidence. Competency probe: Profile legacy violations, quarantine ambiguity, repair deterministically, and validate constraints before enforcement.

For Order the regression proof · Debug Integrity Repair, challenge the documented misconception with result, constraint, or plan evidence: Invalid legacy data should be silently coerced during migration.

options.text: Declare stakeholder question, input relations, row grain, keys, NULL meaning, and expected cardinality for the debug Integrity Repair case
Predict relational transformations, constraint or transaction effects, and dialect boundary before execution for the debug Integrity Repair case
Run the smallest browser SQL statement and retain result rows, changed count, error, or query plan for the debug Integrity Repair case
Reconcile totals and invariants, test changed data, and document security, recovery, and portability limits for the debug Integrity Repair case

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Integrity Repair
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable SQLite increment headed "-- Evidence: sql-integrity-repair-45cd9f" with a concrete grain, hypothesis, or prediction; DDL constraint, migration, or integrity-repair evidence; and an observation, reconciliation, or verification tied to returned rows, changed rows, an error, or a plan.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Integrity Repair.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Integrity Repair into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Integrity Repair, keep Integrity Repair connected to executable relational evidence.

content.code:
-- Evidence: sql-integrity-repair-45cd9f
-- grain: declare the exact row or mutation grain before running
ALTER TABLE tickets ADD COLUMN practice_category_45cd9f TEXT;
-- observation: reconcile the returned rows, changed count, error, or plan with the prediction
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Integrity Repair structural check is only one gate. a constraint-rich, reversible schema migration must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Integrity Repair

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Profile legacy violations, quarantine ambiguity, repair deterministically, and validate constraints before enforcement.
